description: Letter from Sulaymān al-Skandarī, in Damascus, to his brother-in-law Faraj Allāh Ibn Fāḍil and his wife (the writer's sister), in Cairo. Written in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Unknown. He alludes to various business matters. He writes that he arrived safely in Damascus (and crosses out "Hama" which he originally wrote instead). Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב מסולימאן אל-סכנדרי בדמשק לגיסו פרג' אלה אבן פאדל ולאחותו בקהיר. ביהודית-ערבית. מזכיר עניינים עסקיים שונים. מדווח שהגיע בשלום לדמשק.
